posts.author: ElaraWest
posts.text: Hi everyone, I'm trying to secure my account with a new security code and payment card details. Please follow this link to update your login credentials and 2FA settings immediately: [link removed]. Don't miss out on this chance to verify your identity! #securenow #update
posts.explanation: This post requests sensitive authentication data (login details, passwords, 2FA codes) and payment information via a link, which constitutes a fraud scam requiring Escalation.
